steps.t: Erlar is waiting just outside the morroval-workshop, east from the Fanged Pit camp. Hadi asked you to speak to Erlar and help him assault a morroval s…
With the workshop clear of merrevail, the nearby siege-weapon can be dealt with. Hadi asked you to help Erlar assault a morroval siege-weapon workshop…
Hadi as at the Fanged Pit camp, west of the morroval siege-camp. Hadi will want to know that your assault with Erlar was successful.
